data.title: Market News: Trump Organization applies for trademark for "TRUMP" to launch Metaverse and NFT trading platform
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news, the Trump Organization has applied for a trademark for "TRUMP" to launch the metaverse and NFT trading platform.

data.title: Standard Chartered Bank: Bitcoin will fall further to the $69,000-76,500 range
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Geoffrey Kendrick, global head of digital asset research at Standard Chartered Bank, expects Bitcoin prices to fall further to the $69,000 to $76,500 range this weekend or Monday. Kendrick said that falling below $80,000 raised questions about whether the sell-off is about to end, adding that following more than $1 billion in redemptions on Tuesday, ETFs are expected to see another large outflow of funds today. (The Block)

data.title: CME Group to Launch Micro SOL Futures on March 17
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to CME, in addition to SOL futures, CME plans to launch Micro SOL futures (Micro SOL) on March 17 to provide investors with regulated Solana investment exposure.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 3,274 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 24,029 ETH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 3,274 BTC (US$266.53 million) today, of which BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF had an outflow of 2,274 BTC (US$185.1 million), and currently holds 576,046 BTC (US$49.6 billion); 
9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 24,029 ETH (US$51.66 million), of which BlackRock's Ethereum ETF had an outflow of 11,506 ETH (US$24.74 million), and Grayscale ETHE currently holds 1,306,114 ETH (US$2.81 billion).

data.title: Patrick McHenry Joins Ondo Finance As Advisory Board Vice Chair
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ondo Finance has announced that Patrick McHenry, former Chair of the U.S. House Financial Services Committee and a key architect of U.S. financial policy, will join the company as Vice Chair of its Advisory Board. McHenry brings decades of experience in financial policy-making, including leading the bipartisan passage of the 21st Century Financial Investment Trust Act (FIT21) and serving as the interim Speaker of the House in 2023. He is expected to play a crucial role in enhancing Ondo's government relations strategy, regulatory engagement, and thought leadership in the rapidly growing field of tokenized securities.

data.title: CME Group Plans To Launch Solana Futures In March
data.description: According to Odaily, market sources indicate that the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) is planning to introduce Solana (SOL) futures on March 17.

data.title: Solana Surpasses 140 USDT Mark With Modest Gains
data.description: According to Odaily, the cryptocurrency Solana (SOL) has surpassed the 140 USDT mark, currently trading at 140.05 USDT. This represents a 24-hour increase of 0.32%.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 580 USDT with a Narrowed 4.93% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 28, 2025, 14:05 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 580 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 580.98999 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 4.93% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: After the PCE announcement, the probability of the Fed cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in March rose slightly to 5.5%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: After the PCE was released, according to CME FedWatch data, the probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in March rose slightly to 5.5% (previously 4.5%), and there are about 19 days left until the next FOMC meeting.

data.title: Former House Financial Services Committee Chairman Patrick McHenry to serve as Vice Chairman of Ondo Advisory Board
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Patrick McHenry, former chairman of the House Financial Services Committee and a major designer of US financial policy, will join the company as vice chairman of the advisory board. It is reported that Chairman McHenry has decades of experience in formulating financial policies, including leading the bipartisan passage of the 21st Century Financial Investment Trust Act (FIT21) in the House of Representatives and serving as the interim speaker of the House of Representatives in 2023, and will play a major role in strengthening Ondo's government relations strategy, regulatory engagement and thought leadership in the fast-growing field of tokenized securities.
